tape: Broad tape firm/calm into the late session -- S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17%, VIX ~16.50 (-3.9%) on soft June PPI (-0.3% headline, core +0.2%) after Tuesday's cool CPI plus ASML AI-capex; no index/sector shock; quant_regime calm_drift (vol20 14.1, breadth 49% above 20dma) concurs with my read.

alerts.headline: Firm/calm tape: S&P +0.39%, Nasdaq +0.67%, Dow +0.17%, VIX ~16.50 (-3.9%) on soft June PPI + cool CPI + ASML AI-capex. No index/sector shock; quant_regime calm_drift agrees.

HELD ~$2.30 -- 7/15 Wraptor MX first operational prototype + law-enforcement early-adopter program (builds WrapShield handheld+multi-shot+drone) still the freshest item; product/dev milestone, NOT a contract/revenue award, so no boost. risk.json elevated: stock sits at the $2.30 warrant strike (warrant-exercise overhang); nightly desync now reconciling. FinBERT +0.019.

HELD/best gainer ~$14.20 -- no fresh 7/15 catalyst; +13% ICONIQ/director $14.4M buys already priced, KeyBanc Buy PT trimmed to $14 (6/25). Post-lockup Lightspeed/Form 144 (1.75M Class A) distribution overhang persists (risk.json elevated). FinBERT +0.158. No boost.

HELD ~$12.82, down ~25% on the month on uranium-sector softness + VAC-deal uncertainty -- no fresh 7/15 company item; $300M ATM confirmed UNDRAWN, insider signal net-NEGATIVE by size (Chalmers Form 144 200k 6/29 + 300k 7/9 outweighs CEO/Hansen buys). Lorentzian -0.75, FinBERT 0.0. No boost.

HELD ~$16.99, down ~4.9% today on drift (no fresh negative news) -- Caris Detect launch (7/1), director $990k buy (7/13), $100M buyback, NO shelf/ATM. Avg PT ~$28 (9 Buy/3 Hold) above price. FinBERT +0.144. No boost.
HELD ~$5.21 -- no fresh item; director Englander bought 76,190 sh @ $5.22 (7/13, Form 4), Scout MCP/API launch, anti-dilutive $140M self-tender, no shelf/ATM. Next print 9/9. FinBERT 0.0. No boost.

TOP CANDIDATE (below buy line) -- no new July offering; ~30% standing dilution stands ($50M registered direct 27.6M sh @ $1.81 + $9.2M Lilly PIPE closed 6/26, 7/6 F-3 resale). Stock ~$1.70 BELOW offer, CEO buys came AFTER raise. Concur risk.json -- do not buy as insider breakout.
TOP CANDIDATE (below line) -- textbook pump-and-dump: HK microcap ~$0.23 (6/12) to >$10 (6/16), now ~$3.49, no fundamental driver. Reject on pump veto. Concur risk.json.

TOP CANDIDATE (below line) -- 12-for-1 reverse split effective 7/14 (new CUSIP G8071C137) purely for Nasdaq $1 compliance on an unfunded AI/blockchain/crypto pivot; +0.919 FinBERT is a misattributed generic-market headline. Reverse-split cache desync. Concur risk.json -- keep vetoed.

WATCHLIST ~$6.45 -- no fresh item this hour; DLA bridge modification extended the refrigerant contract to 11/29/26 (options to 5/29/27) + Hartree Partners 10%-owner open-market buying already known/scored. No dilution flag. No boost.
